overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a dystopian futuristic city. The player traverses a neon-lit covered walkway, emerges onto an elevated overlook of a busy street with flying cars, proceeds through a dark red-lit service corridor, and enters a vibrant purple neon bar.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath urban overpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a covered walkway beneath a concrete overpass, passing graffiti-covered walls and neon signs

notable_agents.action: person sitting on the ground against the graffiti wall
pedestrian in white shirt walking ahead toward the exit

entered.detail: illuminated yellow signage for pawn shop mounted on concrete wall
concrete overpass structure forming a roof over the walkway
concrete wall covered in colorful spray paint and tags
glowing red neon medical cross sign hanging from ceiling

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a covered urban walkway beneath an overpass. The environment features gritty concrete walls covered in graffiti, neon signage including a prominent pawn shop sign, and scattered debris. Sparse pedestrians move through the corridor, including one person sitting against the wall and others walking toward the distant exit where city lights are visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian overlook of busy street

events.description: exits covered walkway onto elevated overlook with view of street below
flying cars pass by on the street below the overlook

agents.ego_description: walking along an elevated overlook observing the busy street below with flying vehicle traffic and neon advertisements

entered.detail: large orange neon sign for food establishment mounted on building facade
black metal railing along the edge of the elevated walkway
tall building with illuminated white signage reading KENDACHI
pink and white fireworks exploding in the night sky above buildings

segments.scene_description: The scene opens onto an elevated overlook revealing a sprawling futuristic cityscape at night. The camera moves along a walkway bordered by metal railings, overlooking a busy street with flying cars and neon-lit buildings. Fireworks explode in the distance near the Kendachi building while the Buck-a-Slice sign glows prominently across the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: service corridor with vending machines and red lighting

events.description: turns away from open street view into dark enclosed corridor
ambient lighting shifts dramatically to dominant red neon glow

agents.ego_description: proceeding through a narrow corridor illuminated by red neon lights, passing vending machines and digital advertisements

notable_agents.action: man in dark jacket and sunglasses walking toward the camera

entered.detail: intense red neon tubes illuminating the corridor walls and ceiling
row of illuminated vending machines with various products
vending machine with bright BURRITO signage and food images
large structural doorway painted yellow marking transition to next area

segments.scene_description: The camera turns from the open overlook into a narrow, enclosed service corridor bathed in intense red neon light. The walls are lined with vending machines including one prominently advertising burritos. The space feels industrial and confined compared to the previous open vista, with a yellow door frame visible at the far end marking the next transition.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular neon bar with purple ambient lighting

events.description: enters bar interior from dark corridor into vibrant purple neon space
approaches circular bar counter with bright pink and purple neon illumination

agents.ego_description: entering a futuristic bar and approaching the circular counter where patrons sit on neon-trimmed stools

notable_agents.action: bartender standing behind the circular counter serving drinks
patron sitting on bar stool facing the counter

entered.detail: large circular bar counter with bright pink neon trim and glowing purple base
ambient purple and pink neon lights reflecting off wet floor surfaces
television screens mounted on walls displaying advertisements and menus
large windows showing the neon-lit street outside with passing vehicles

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals a vibrant bar interior dominated by a circular counter glowing with intense pink and purple neon light. The camera moves through the space past patrons seated on illuminated stools, approaching the bar where a bartender stands ready. Digital screens display advertisements on the walls while large windows offer a view of the neon-soaked street outside, completing the transition from gritty corridor to lively commercial interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a gritty urban underpass into the vibrant, neon-soaked interior of a futuristic bar. It begins by moving through a covered walkway of graffiti-covered concrete and scattered debris, passing sparse pedestrians beneath flickering pawn shop signs. As the camera reaches the end of the corridor, the space opens onto an elevated overlook of a sprawling cityscape where flying cars swarm beneath exploding fireworks and glowing advertisements. The scene then shifts abruptly from the open vista into a narrow, industrial service corridor bathed in intense red light and lined with burrito vending machines. Finally, the camera passes through a yellow door frame to reveal a lively bar interior dominated by a circular counter of glowing pink and purple neon, with digital screens and patrons completing the transition into a commercial hub.
